query: SELECT id, name, neighborhood FROM establishments WHERE LOWER(name) LIKE '%swing%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%puteiro%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%cabar%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%kabar%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%kibedohassib%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute SELECT id, name, neighborhood FROM establishments WHERE LOWER(name) LIKE '%swing%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%puteiro%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%cabar%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%kabar%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%kibedohassib%';
